data.title: Apple Pay Expands Buy Now, Pay Later With Affirm, Adds Support For Third-Party Browsers And More
data.description: Apple Inc expands Apple Pay with installment loan and reward options for online and in-app purchases, partnering with Affirm, Klarna, Citi, Synchrony, Fiserv, and others.

data.title: Why Applied Materials Stock Is Moving
data.description: Applied Materials shares are trading higher by 1.9% during Thursday's session. Semiconductor stocks rose Thursday after Taiwan Semiconductor's strong earnings report.

data.title: Hamas Chief, Oct. 7 Mastermind Yahya Sinwar Possibly Dead: IDF Conducts DNA Tests After Gaza Clash
data.description: After a clash with militants, Israeli infantry discovered the corpse of a man with a resemblance to Sinwar.
